message:
fr-conformance: complete packet-006 WAIT/WAITAOF invalid-arg matrix (bd-2j1i)

Why:
- Packet-006 fixture still lacked several invalid-argument paths now covered in runtime + core_errors.
- Keeping packet journey and generic error suites aligned prevents drift.

What changed:
- Updated `crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/fr_p2c_006_replication_journey.json` to add:
  - `wait_rejects_negative_timeout` (`WAIT 1 -1`)
  - `waitaof_rejects_non_integer_local_threshold` (`WAITAOF nope 1 0`)
  - `waitaof_rejects_negative_timeout` (`WAITAOF 1 0 -1`)
- Shifted subsequent `now_ms` fields to preserve deterministic ordering.

Validation:
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p fr-conformance -- --nocapture`
- `ubs crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/fr_p2c_006_replication_journey.json`

Traceability:
- Bead: bd-2j1i
- Mail thread: br-2j1i
